Pennsylvania SNAP Handbook: Appendix A: Current Geographical Areas Waived by Food and Nutrition Services (FNS)

As of September 1, 2025, The Food and Nutrition Service (FNS) has not approved Pennsylvania’s request for a geographic waiver. All counties in Pennsylvania are subject to the Time-Limited Receipt of Benefits.
